INDICE:
- Columnas a modificarse
- Columnas nuevas
- Tablas a eliminarse
- Columnas a eliminarse
- Llaves a eliminarse
- Tablas nuevas
- Reglas nuevas
- Llaves nuevas o a regenerarse
- Indices para llaves forįneas
- Objetos a Renombrase



COLUMNAS QUE VAN A SER ALTERADAS EN LA BASE DE DATOS PORQUE TIENEN CARACTERISTICAS MODIFICADAS EN EL MODELO DBM
TABLACOLUMNA TIPOLONDECoblidedflrul
ACategoriaACcatvutil
MODELO DBM: CHAR 1 0 1 0 ([ACcatvutil]='N' OR [ACcatvutil]='S')
BASE DATOS : CHAR 1 0 1 0
AClasificacionACdepreciable
MODELO DBM: CHAR 1 0 1 0 S ([ACdepreciable]='N' OR [ACdepreciable]='S')
BASE DATOS : CHAR 1 0 1 0 S
AClasificacionACrevalua
MODELO DBM: CHAR 1 0 1 0 N ([ACrevalua]='N' OR [ACrevalua]='S')

MODELO DBM: CHAR 1 0 1 0 M ([ACtipo]='P' OR [ACtipo]='M')

MODELO DBM: CHAR 1 0 1 0 N ([ACexigeVale]='N' OR [ACexigeVale]='S')
BASE DATOS : CHAR 1 0 1 0 N

MODELO DBM: INTEGER 10 0 1 0 0 ([Astatus]=(60) OR [Astatus]=(0))

MODELO DBM: INTEGER 10 0 1 0 ([AFCtipo]=(1))

BASE DATOS : INTEGER 10 0 0 0
WfActivityStartMode
MODELO DBM: VARCHAR 9 0 1 0 AUTOMATIC ([StartMode]='MANUAL' OR [StartMode]='AUTOMATIC')

MODELO DBM: VARCHAR 9 0 1 0 AUTOMATIC ([FinishMode]='MANUAL' OR [FinishMode]='AUTOMATIC')

MODELO DBM: INTEGER 3 0 1 0 3 ([Priority]=(5) OR [Priority]=(4) OR [Priority]=(3) OR [Priority]=(2) OR [Priority]=(1))
BASE DATOS : INTEGER 3 0 1 0 3
WfActivityImplementationType
MODELO DBM: VARCHAR 7 0 1 0 NONE ([ImplementationType]='BLOCK' OR [ImplementationType]='LOOP' OR [ImplementationType]='SUBFLOW' OR [ImplementationType]='TOOL' OR [ImplementationType]='ROUTE' OR [ImplementationType]='NONE')
BASE DATOS : VARCHAR 7 0 1 0 NONE

MODELO DBM: VARCHAR 4 0 1 0 NONE ([SplitType]='XOR' OR [SplitType]='AND' OR [SplitType]='NONE')
BASE DATOS : VARCHAR 4 0 1 0 NONE
WfActivityJoinType
MODELO DBM: VARCHAR 4 0 1 0 NONE ([JoinType]='XOR' OR [JoinType]='AND' OR [JoinType]='NONE')
BASE DATOS : VARCHAR 4 0 1 0 NONE
WfActivityInstantiation
MODELO DBM: VARCHAR 8 0 1 0 MULTIPLE ([Instantiation]='MULTIPLE' OR [Instantiation]='ONCE')
BASE DATOS : VARCHAR 8 0 1 0 MULTIPLE
WfActivityDurationEstimation
MODELO DBM: NUMERIC 15 4 1 0 1 ([DurationEstimation]>=(0))
BASE DATOS : NUMERIC 15 4 1 0 1

BASE DATOS : LOGIC 1 0 1 0 1

BASE DATOS : LOGIC 1 0 1 0 1

BASE DATOS : VARCHAR 10 0 1 0 STRING
WfApplicationType
MODELO DBM: VARCHAR 11 0 1 0 ([Type]='CFC' OR [Type]='EJB' OR [Type]='SUBFLOW' OR [Type]='WEBSERVICE' OR [Type]='PROCEDURE' OR [Type]='APPLICATION')
BASE DATOS : VARCHAR 11 0 1 0

MODELO DBM: VARCHAR 10 0 1 0 STRING ([Datatype]='FILE' OR [Datatype]='XML' OR [Datatype]='NUMERIC' OR [Datatype]='STRING')
BASE DATOS : VARCHAR 10 0 1 0 STRING

BASE DATOS : VARCHAR 5 0 1 0 IN
WfFormalParameterDatatype
MODELO DBM: VARCHAR 10 0 1 0 STRING ([Datatype]='FILE' OR [Datatype]='XML' OR [Datatype]='NUMERIC' OR [Datatype]='STRING')
BASE DATOS : VARCHAR 10 0 1 0 STRING
WfInvocationExecution
MODELO DBM: VARCHAR 7 0 1 0 SYNCHR ([Execution]='ASYNCHR' OR [Execution]='SYNCHR')
BASE DATOS : VARCHAR 7 0 1 0 SYNCHR
WfPackageGraphConformance
MODELO DBM: VARCHAR 12 0 1 0 NON_BLOCKED ([GraphConformance]='NON_BLOCKED' OR [GraphConformance]='LOOP_BLOCKED' OR [GraphConformance]='FULL_BLOCKED')
BASE DATOS : VARCHAR 12 0 1 0 NON_BLOCKED
WfPackagePublicationStatus
MODELO DBM: VARCHAR 14 0 1 0 UNDER_REVISION ([PublicationStatus]='RELEASED' OR [PublicationStatus]='UNDER_TEST' OR [PublicationStatus]='UNDER_REVISION')
BASE DATOS : VARCHAR 14 0 1 0 UNDER_REVISION
WfParticipantParticipantType
MODELO DBM: VARCHAR 19 0 1 0 ROLE ([ParticipantType]='BOSSES2' OR [ParticipantType]='BOSSES1' OR [ParticipantType]='BOSS2' OR [ParticipantType]='BOSS1' OR [ParticipantType]='BOSS' OR [ParticipantType]='ORGUNIT' OR [ParticipantType]='ROLE' OR [ParticipantType]='GROUP' OR [ParticipantType]='ADMIN' OR [ParticipantType]='HUMAN')
BASE DATOS : VARCHAR 19 0 1 0 ROLE
WfProcessPublicationStatus
MODELO DBM: VARCHAR 14 0 1 0 UNDER_REVISION ([PublicationStatus]='RETIRED' OR [PublicationStatus]='RELEASED' OR [PublicationStatus]='UNDER_TEST' OR [PublicationStatus]='UNDER_REVISION')
BASE DATOS : VARCHAR 14 0 1 0 UNDER_REVISION
WfProcessPriority
MODELO DBM: INTEGER 3 0 1 0 3 ([Priority]=(5) OR [Priority]=(4) OR [Priority]=(3) OR [Priority]=(2) OR [Priority]=(1))
BASE DATOS : INTEGER 3 0 1 0 3
WfProcessDurationUnit
MODELO DBM: CHAR 1 0 1 0 h ([DurationUnit]='s' OR [DurationUnit]='m' OR [DurationUnit]='h' OR [DurationUnit]='D' OR [DurationUnit]='M' OR [DurationUnit]='Y')
BASE DATOS : CHAR 1 0 1 0 h
WfProcessDurationEstimation
MODELO DBM: NUMERIC 15 4 1 0 1 ([DurationEstimation]>=(0))
BASE DATOS : NUMERIC 15 4 1 0 1
WfTransitionLoop
MODELO DBM: VARCHAR 8 0 1 0 NOLOOP ([Loop]='TOLOOP' OR [Loop]='FROMLOOP' OR [Loop]='NOLOOP')
BASE DATOS : VARCHAR 8 0 1 0 NOLOOP
WfTransitionType
MODELO DBM: CHAR 9 0 1 0 MANUAL ([Type]='MANUAL' OR [Type]='OTHERWISE' OR [Type]='CONDITION')
BASE DATOS : CHAR 9 0 1 0 MANUAL
WfxActivityProcessId
MODELO DBM: NUMERIC 18 0 1 0
BASE DATOS : NUMERIC 18 0 0 0
WfxActivityState
MODELO DBM: VARCHAR 9 0 1 0 INACTIVE ([State]='ACTIVE' OR [State]='COMPLETED' OR [State]='SUSPENDED' OR [State]='INACTIVE')
BASE DATOS : VARCHAR 9 0 1 0 INACTIVE
WfxActivityWaitingTime
MODELO DBM: NUMERIC 15 4 1 0 0 ([WaitingTime]>=(0))

BASE DATOS : VARCHAR 5 0 1 0

MODELO DBM: VARCHAR 10 0 1 0 INITIATED ([State]='TERMINATED' OR [State]='COMPLETE' OR [State]='SUSPENDED' OR [State]='ACTIVE' OR [State]='RUNNING' OR [State]='INITIATED')
BASE DATOS : VARCHAR 10 0 1 0 INITIATED
WfxProcessWaitingTime
MODELO DBM: NUMERIC 15 4 1 0 0 ([WaitingTime]>=(0))
BASE DATOS : NUMERIC 15 4 1 0 0
WfxProcessWorkingTime
MODELO DBM: NUMERIC 15 4 1 0 0 ([WorkingTime]>=(0))
BASE DATOS : NUMERIC 15 4 1 0 0
